title: Bump to v1.13.0
body:
As the title says.  In preparation for RHEL 8.9/9.3

Once merged, I'll create a tag, release, and release branch.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

comments.body:
just to confirm, will there be a release-1.13 branch after this is cut? Otherwise, it might be better to bump to `v1.13.1-dev`.

EDIT: Saying this because I don't see a release-1.12 branch.

EDIT2: should've read the commit description before commenting.
